title: rosa tomentosa var. mollissima
intro: Rosa tomentosa var. mollissima, also known as the woolly rose or Chinese rose, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rosaceae and is native to China. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, making it a valuable medicinal plant. Rosa tomentosa var. mollissima has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and promoting wound healing.
